title: LinearXP
description: Changes the bad RPG-style exponential XP curve to a configurable linear one.
body:
![Gaining XP to showcase linear levels.](https://i.imgur.com/HvGkLR9.gif)
An independent mod for 1.7.10 that changes the bad RPG style exponential XP curve to a configurable linear one. It was made due to a lack of any existing mod that performs similar functions for sub-1.8 [because of the limitations in Forge's event hooking](https://www.minecraftforum.net/forums/mapping-and-modding-java-edition/minecraft-mods/modification-development/2598616-changing-the-exp-required-to-level-up). Source code is on GitHub, and any issues should be reported there. Feel free to include it in any modpack =)
